image:image.image:title: Balaji Farm Luxury Villa & Infinity Pool
image:image.image:caption: A premium sanctuary of nature and luxury near Mumbai.

image:image.image:title: Private Swimming Pool at Balaji Farm
image:image.image:caption: Cool down in our pristine private pool surrounded by greenery.

image:image.image:title: Luxury Bedroom Suite
image:image.image:caption: Elegantly designed 4 BHK villa rooms for a comfortable stay.

image:image.image:title: Professional Cricket Turf
image:image.image:caption: Enjoy a game of cricket on our high-quality turf pitch.

image:image.image:title: Grand Entrance of Balaji Farm
image:image.image:caption: A majestic welcome to your luxury weekend getaway.
